title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・泥道こそ花道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So what if it's raining? So what if it's muddy? I'll
take 'em head-on and leave 'em all in my wake!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: RAAAH! ONWAAAAARD!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! Kitasan Black is cutting through the
mud and muck with incredible power! She's
sprinting for the finish line and—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Wow! She's standing triumphantly in the middle of
the track! What a sight! The crowd of 60,000
strong is in utter disbelief!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
What... what was that? She didn't even stumble
while going through the worst bits on the track!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That's Kitasan Black for you! Even when others
shy away, she charges right in!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! That was awesome! Go, Kitasaaan!
You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Dang, how are you this good?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she soaks in the crowd's cheers, Kitasan Black's
expression is more akin to one of satisfaction at a
job well done rather than one of joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clutch captain Kitasan Black was completely
unphased by the torrential storm and has
managed to win smiles from the whole crowd.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita... You're just too amazing... I only ever think
about winning my races, but you...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're different. You care about things far
beyond your own victory...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't compare with you at all, let alone win
against you. I...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I have to become better as well before the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This all worked out thanks to you! I really won
after following your plan to the letter!
choice_data_list:
Nope, it's your strength that made this win
possible!

Nope, it's your strength that made this win
possible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That strategy would've gone nowhere if she didn't
have tremendous fortitude and power to
overcome such poor conditions. It only worked
because we believed in each other's strengths.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That was a race for the ages, Kitasan Black! You
put on a real show, thundering through the mud.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! The weather wasn't the greatest, but I did
my best to give everyone a good time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The fans had it rough out there today, but I
promise...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll treat everyone to a huge and
cheery festival like they've never seen before!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
A huge festival? Could it be? Are you alluding to
what I think you're talking about?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I am! I'm talking about a worldwide festival where
the best of the best Umamusume gather!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be running with the biggest names in
the Japan Cup! We'll get the party started at
Tokyo Racecourse one more time!
